title: Multilingual Document Processing OCR for Global Business Operations
metaTitle: Multilingual Document Processing OCR for Global Business
metaDescription: Convert multilingual invoices, contracts, and financial documents to Excel spreadsheets with AI-powered OCR technology. Support for digital PDFs and scanned images.
h1: Multilingual Document Processing OCR for Global Business Operations

hero.headline: Process Documents in Multiple Languages with AI-Powered OCR
hero.subheadline: Convert international invoices, contracts, and financial documents to structured Excel spreadsheets, regardless of language or document format

summary: Global businesses need efficient ways to process documents in multiple languages, from supplier invoices in German to shipping documents in Spanish. GridPull's AI-powered OCR technology extracts data from multilingual documents and converts them to structured Excel spreadsheets, supporting both digital PDFs and scanned documents across various languages and layouts.
whoItsFor: Multi-region finance teams handling invoices and receipts
whenThisIsRelevant: Processing invoices from suppliers in different countries
Converting scanned multilingual contracts to searchable data
Automating data entry from international financial reports
supportedInputs: Digital PDF invoices in multiple languages
Photos of international receipts and shipping documents
expectedOutputs: Structured Excel files with extracted multilingual data
CSV spreadsheets with one row per processed document
commonChallenges: Manual data entry from documents in unfamiliar languages
Inconsistent formatting across different country suppliers
Time-consuming processing of mixed digital and scanned documents
Difficulty extracting data from poor-quality international faxes
howItWorksSteps: Upload multilingual PDFs, images, or photos to the platform
AI OCR technology recognizes text across different languages and character sets
Select specific fields to extract from each document type
Download structured Excel or CSV files with organized multilingual data
whyPdfExcelAiFits: Handles both digital PDFs and scanned documents with OCR technology
AI-powered extraction works across multiple languages and layouts
Batch processing capabilities for high-volume international operations
Custom field selection adapts to different document formats by country
limitations: Accuracy depends on document scan quality and clarity
Handwritten text recognition is limited compared to typed multilingual text
Very complex nested tables in some international formats may need manual review

faq.question: Which languages does the OCR technology support?
faq.answer: The AI-powered OCR can process documents with text in multiple languages, though accuracy varies based on character clarity and document quality. Latin-based alphabets typically achieve the highest accuracy rates.

faq.question: How does accuracy compare between scanned and digital multilingual documents?
faq.answer: Digital PDFs generally achieve 99%+ accuracy regardless of language, while scanned documents depend on image quality. Clear, high-resolution scans in any language typically perform better than poor-quality faxes or photos.

faq.question: Can I process mixed batches of documents in different languages?
faq.answer: Yes, you can upload batches containing documents in multiple languages simultaneously. The AI automatically detects and processes text regardless of the language mix within your batch.

faq.question: What happens with documents that have both English and foreign language text?
faq.answer: The system processes mixed-language documents by extracting all readable text regardless of language. You can then select which specific fields to include in your final Excel output during the customization step.

trustSignals: Files encrypted and automatically deleted after processing
Free tier available to test with your multilingual documents
Pipeline automation for recurring international workflows
exampleUseCases: European subsidiary processing invoices from German, French, and Italian suppliers
Import company converting scanned Spanish shipping documents to Excel tracking sheets
Multi-national corporation automating data entry from Japanese and Korean financial reports
Global retailer processing multilingual purchase orders from various country vendors
